deck.title: Studio
deck.tagline: Six chapters. From who we are to your first day. Select a chapter to begin.
deck.introSubtitle: How we work, what we build, what we believe.

who-we-are.title: Who We Are
who-we-are.subtitle: Big ideas, human taste, AI velocity.
who-we-are.summary: We are a creative studio that builds with intelligence. Not a software shop with a design layer, not a design shop that dabbles in code — we are a team that uses AI to expand what is possible at every stage of the process.
heroPoints: Craft and speed are not opposites
who-we-are.callout: We don’t use AI to go faster. We use AI to go further.

what-we-build.title: What We Build
what-we-build.subtitle: Five practice areas. One integrated team.
what-we-build.summary: Every engagement touches more than one practice. The best work lives at the intersection of rigorous research, strategic clarity, and craft execution.

practices.title: Research Practice
practices.body: Primary and secondary research, user studies, market analysis, and behavioral synthesis. We find the insight others miss.

practices.title: Strategy Practice
practices.body: Brand positioning, audience architecture, messaging frameworks, and go-to-market planning. Direction before execution.

practices.title: Innovation Practice
practices.body: AI-assisted ideation, rapid prototyping, concept sprints, and emerging technology integration. What’s next, now.

practices.title: Branding Practice
practices.body: Visual identity, design systems, typographic standards, and brand governance. The look and feel of an idea.

practices.title: Creative AI Practice
practices.body: Model-assisted creative direction, prompt engineering for production, AI output curation, and human-AI workflow design.

what-we-build.callout: Practices are lenses, not silos. Most briefs require three or more to answer properly.

our-process.title: Our Process
our-process.subtitle: Eight steps from brief to delivery.

steps.title: Intake
steps.body: Define the brief, set success criteria, align on timeline and budget.

steps.title: Research
steps.body: Understand the context, audience, competitors, and constraints.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.body: Frame the problem, define the solution space, establish direction.

steps.title: Concepting
steps.body: AI-assisted ideation phase — generate, filter, select, elevate.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Translate selected concepts into refined, presentable artifacts.

steps.title: Execution
steps.body: Build at production quality with AI tooling and human oversight.

steps.title: Review
steps.body: Cross-functional review, client presentation, and feedback integration.

our-process.callout: The first step of the process is to trust the process.

we-believe.title: We Believe
we-believe.subtitle: The ideas we hold regardless of brief.
we-believe.statement:
Fulfill a Need.
Create a Feeling.
beliefs: Good work starts with a good question.
Humans set the direction. AI closes the distance.
Constraints are the brief inside the brief.
The best idea should win — regardless of where it came from.
we-believe.callout: We measure by the quality of our output, not the hours we logged.

our-clients.title: Who We Work With
our-clients.subtitle: The types of clients we do our best work for.

categories.label: Challenger Brands
categories.body: Brands that are right but not yet noticed — we help them become unavoidable.

categories.label: Enterprise at Pivot
categories.body: Large organizations navigating transformation — we give them clarity and velocity.

categories.label: Category Creators
categories.body: Clients who are defining something new — we help them name, frame, and own the space.

categories.label: Mission-Driven Orgs
categories.body: Government, non-profit, and civic entities — we amplify impact without diluting rigor.

categories.label: AI-Native Ventures
categories.body: Teams building with AI at the core — we bring creative craft to technical ambition.

categories.label: Platform Companies
categories.body: Networks and platforms scaling their community — we design for belonging, not just use.

our-clients.callout: The best client relationships begin with mutual respect for the brief — and for each other.

first-day.title: Your First Day
first-day.subtitle: What you need to know before week one is over.
first-day.summary: First week at the studio sets the tone for everything. We move fast, but not carelessly. We have high expectations, but we also have context, support, and a genuine interest in your success here.
heroPoints: Read the handbook before asking — it’s written for you
Brief is law — if it’s unclear, ask before you assume
AI output is your output — own what you produce
Show work early and often — we critique, not dismiss
Lunch is sacred — we eat together on Tuesdays
first-day.callout: Nobody expects you to know everything on day one. We do expect you to ask.
